channel.title: Comments for page "And I Think To Myself..."
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "And I Think To Myself..."

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: this is my favourite post on the entire site, containing some of my favourite characters. thank you for for the entire vend a friend hub, i always come back to read this tale specifically every couple months. :)

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I hope others use this worldbuilding for their own! Such vivid imagery and interesting characters.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: You're one of my favourite writers here. I honestly smiled the entire time while reading this! You managed to capture perfectly the whimsy that I love to see on this wiki. Anyways, I hope your break from writing is restorative.

item.title: Re: Well Hello There...
item.content:encoded:
Amazing as usual, DarkFriend. It hits the same charismatic note as Ascension and it fits in perfectly with D&C.

What a wonderful world. +1

item.title: Re: Well Hello There...
item.content:encoded: Ah nah, I do plan on coming back. Break, not "break". But it might be a while. I am making songs now, as they are my number one passion, and I plan to bring that skill to the site when I come back. For now, I am gonna make at least one album before I return. Focus all my energy into making that so that I start strong and then come back when I have the talent and knowledge necessary to juggle two creative outlets. Anyways, thanks for the compliment! Though I do see that you didn't upvote yet :P

item.title: Re: Well Hello There...
item.content:encoded:
Great work on this! Always sorry to see an author go, but hopefully you'll be back at somepoint refreshed and ready to go(Not sure if you're taking a break, or a "break".)

o7

item.title: Well Hello There...
item.content:encoded:
So you may be asking "wait what is this and why". So, I haven't posted in 4 months. In that time, this has been sitting in my sandbox. Just a paragraph or two from being ready to go. I'm taking a break from the site. Well, that was a bit nonchalant. Let me give it some emphasis.

I'm taking a break from the site.

There, that's better. But before I really took my leave, I wanted to get this out. It's pure world building — or should I say, Wonder World!™ building? heheheheh — on my headcanon of Wondertainment. It also might be the most world building on Wondertainment in a single article… ever. I don't know if it's good. It probably is? It made me smile like a madman when I was writing it. It made me very happy to write. I sorta forewent the critique process because this is, oddly enough, a bit more personal to me, and I just want it to be out there. I'm really okay if it doesn't do amazingly well. And I'm okay if the ending is a bit weak. It's less a story and more crafted exposition — both on the world and on a key character in Vend-a-Friend. I gave Polly her own chapter, it was time to give my favorite character from the series, Judy the Tongue, hers.

So, that's that. I might be posting something for the 4000 contest, but other than that, expect me to be gone for a while. I also might be taking co-author credit for… two things that are in the works right now, but it won't really be me posting. I'm still gonna read some, and vote, and comment some, but a pause on writing is going into effect.

And with that, Wonder World!™ is complete! It is able to be written by anybody now, no speculation. The groundwork is all there. If anyone wants to write in this setting, they are so, so very free to. I'd love to see that. But that's kind of a pipe dream. Alright, I'm done rambling.

Enjoy.

EDIT: Also, this is my second longest tale (and thus article) on the site. It clocks in at 9,863 words. My longest tale, Waiting on the Good Times, clocks in at roughly 10,584 words. So this is 721 words less than that. Just some interesting facts.
